steps.title: Distribute the coefficient
steps.content:
Multiply $84$ by both terms inside the parentheses:
$$
y=84x-84(3)+287
$$
$$
y=84x-252+287
$$

steps.title: Combine the constants
steps.content: Add the constant terms: $$ -252+287=35 $$ So the equivalent equation is $y=84x+35$. The answer is C.
